name: Chocolate Meringue Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar, salt, flour, cornstarch, milk, cocoa, and oil in a saucepan.
2. Heat to boiling, stirring constantly until the mixture thickens.
3. Remove from heat. Stir about half of the chocolate mixture into the eggs until completely blended.
4. Pour the mixture back into the saucepan and continue cooking, stirring constantly until it boils again.
5. Remove from heat and blend in butter and vanilla.
6. Pour into a crust and chill.
